disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Captain of Hantavirus cruise horror quarantined in Poland - TVP World
updates.body_en: Captain of Hantavirus cruise horror quarantined in Poland TVP World
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮疫情船长在波兰隔离。

updates.title_en: Fact Check : WHO Never Linked Hantavirus to Child Vaccination
updates.summary_zh: 事实核查：WHO 从未将汉坦病毒与儿童疫苗接种关联。

updates.title_en: Deadly Hantavirus Reaches U . S . Soil : Quarantined Patients in Nebraska and Atlanta After Cruise Ship Outbreak Kills Three and Infects Dozens Worldwide
updates.summary_zh: 致命汉坦病毒抵达美国，内布拉斯加和亚特兰大患者隔离，邮轮疫情致3死数十感染。

updates.title_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak
updates.summary_zh: 皮特金县确认当地汉坦病毒风险与邮轮疫情毒株不同。

updates.title_en: MAHA activists arent happy with RFK Jr ., and the fallout is over HHS Secretary decision on legal protections for hantavirus treatment drugmakers
updates.summary_zh: MAHA 活动人士不满 RFK Jr. 关于汉坦病毒治疗药物法律保护的决定。

updates.title_en: Brit hospitalised with hantavirus in the Netherlands after cruise ship outbreak returns to united kingdom
updates.summary_zh: 一名英国人在荷兰感染汉坦病毒住院，此前邮轮爆发疫情后返回英国。

updates.title_en: Three people released from Kansas hospital after hantavirus exposure
updates.summary_zh: 三名接触汉坦病毒的人员从堪萨斯医院出院。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cases In Colorado Have Health Officials Concerned
updates.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州汉坦病毒病例引发卫生官员担忧。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship at center of hantavirus outbreak to undergo extra cleaning
updates.summary_zh: 爆发汉坦病毒的邮轮将接受额外清洁。

updates.title_en: Spain confirms second hantavirus case from MV Hondius
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙确认来自MV Hondius邮轮的第二例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine - Global News
updates.body_en: Saskatoon researchers in ‘very early stages’ of animal testing for hantavirus vaccine Global News
updates.summary_zh: 萨斯卡通研究人员对汉坦病毒疫苗进行动物试验早期阶段。

updates.title_en: Briton treated in Netherlands for hantavirus returns to united kingdom
updates.summary_zh: 一名在荷兰接受治疗的英国汉坦病毒患者返回英国。

updates.title_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak - AspenTimes.com
updates.body_en: PitCo confirms local hantavirus risk differs from strain linked to cruise ship outbreak AspenTimes.com
updates.summary_zh: 皮特金县确认当地汉坦病毒风险与邮轮爆发毒株不同。
